name: Todd and the Book of Pure Evil
original_name: Todd and the Book of Pure Evil
overview: A stoner metalhead named Todd Smith, his crushee Jenny, his best friend Curtis, and the geeky Hannah, search their high school for a mayhem-causing Satanic spell book, while being opposed by Atticus, the evil guidance councillor.

trailers.title: Todd & The Book of Pure Evil - the trailer of pure evil
